title: 'A well-balanced and genuinely impressive home and office mini PC': The Geekom A5 Pro with Ryzen 5 gets a big price cut
summary: Powered by an AMD Ryzen 5 7530U processor, the Geekom A5 Pro includes 16GB DDR4 memory (upgradeable to 96GB), a 1TB SSD, quad-display support, Windows 11 Pro, Wi-Fi 6, and 2.5Gb Ethernet in a compact mini PC.
caption: output/2026-07-20/a-well-balanced-and-genuinely-impressive-home-and-office-mini-pc-the-g.txt
